data.title: Janus International Group Announces Two Appointments to Its Board of Directors
data.description: Temple, Georgia - Janus International Group, Inc. (NYSE: JBI) disclosed the additions of Jeannine Lane and Paul Vasington to its Board of Directors. The appointments are effective immediately. Ms. Lane will lead the Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee, while Mr. Vasington will be part of the Audit Committee and the new Board. Janus, a prominent manufacturer of self-storage, commercial, and industrial building solutions, continues to expand its leadership team with these strategic appointments.

data.title: Evogene Earnings Review: Q4 Summary
data.description: Evogene (NASDAQ: EVGN) released its Q4 earnings report on Thursday, March 5, 2026, at 07:00 AM. The company reported an EPS of $-0.61, missing estimated earnings by -134.62% compared to an estimate of $-0.26. Additionally, revenue was down by $1.30 million from the corresponding period in the previous year. In the previous quarter, Evogene had exceeded earnings expectations. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Gilat to Highlight Next‑Generation Satellite Connectivity Technologies at Satellite 2026 – “Expanding 5G to Space”
data.description: Gilat is paving the way for the future of 5G NTN multi-orbit, multi-service connectivity in the global mobility and broadband markets. The company is rapidly advancing this technology to meet the increasing demand for high-speed internet and seamless connectivity. This development is crucial as the world moves towards a more interconnected future. With Gilat's efforts, users can expect improved speeds and reliability in their internet connections, benefiting a large number of people worldwide. This milestone signifies a major step forward in the evolution of communication technology and its potential impact on society.

data.title: Investors Receive I-526E Approvals in 4 and 8 Months for High-Unemployment TEA EB-5 Project
data.description: In San Francisco, Golden Gate Global has announced swift approvals for I-526E petitions for investors in the Appellation Healdsburg Hotel EB-5 project situated in Sonoma County Wine Country, California. The project, endorsed by Golden Gate Global in 2025, has finished construction and started hosting guests in September 2025. The hotel has garnered positive feedback early on, boasting an impressive rating of approximately 9.3 on Booking.com, 4.8 on Google, and 4.9 on Tripadvisor.

data.title: Quantum Computing Stock Rigetti's Momentum Spikes As Investors Look Past Q4 Revenue Miss
data.description: Despite falling short of analyst expectations with fourth-quarter revenue of $1.87 million as opposed to the consensus estimate of $2.34 million, Rigetti Computing Inc. (NASDAQ: RGTI) is experiencing a surge in market enthusiasm. The company's momentum score jumped from 84.04 to 91.90 week-on-week, ranking them in the top 10% of stocks for relative price strength. Investors seem more focused on technical achievements, as Rigetti announced a significant breakthrough achieving 99.9% two-qubit gate fidelity at a 28-nanosecond gate speed. This milestone is crucial for entanglement and enhances Rigetti's superconducting architecture.

data.title: Syntax Data Announces Saidee™, Exclusive AI Agent and Portfolio Development Application
data.description: A prominent financial data and technology company, Syntax Data, introduced its advanced AI agent and portfolio development application, Saidee™, in New York. Saidee™ is tailored to enhance the capabilities of financial advisors by facilitating the effortless generation, continuous supervision, and promotional backing of individualized, rules-based portfolios and indices. Syntax Data has made the application accessible to the RIA community through its exclusive index creation platform, Syntax Direct™. Saidee™ aims to empower financial advisors with a comprehensive tool to efficiently manage portfolios.

data.title: Everspin Advances High-Reliability xSPI MRAM Portfolio With 256Mb Density and Production Qualification Milestones
data.description: Everspin Technologies, Inc. announced significant advancements in its high-reliability PERSYST xSPI STT-MRAM product line. The company, a key player in MRAM solutions, achieved full production qualification for its 64Mb MRAM and introduced a new 256Mb option. The HR 64Mb xSPI STT-MRAM successfully completed full production qualification, showcasing progress in memory technology. This development highlights Everspin's commitment to innovation and expansion within the MRAM market.

data.title: Ambiq Reveals 12nm SPOT® Platform Enabling Operation Down to 300mV for Atomiq™
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Ambiq Micro, Inc. disclosed details about its upcoming Atomiq™ SoC, a product focused on ultra-low-power semiconductor solutions for edge AI. The SoC is developed on Ambiq's latest 12nm SPOT® platform utilizing the TSMC N12e® process. Atomiq features a novel Ultra-Low-Power (ULP) mode designed to function at voltages as low as 300mV, the lowest in Ambiq's history. This announcement signifies the inaugural use of SPOT on a FinFET node, setting a milestone in the industry.
